prompt_text:
MODE: META
OBJECTIVE: Activate mandatory logging policy.
REQUIREMENTS: no response without InteractionLog entry, unique index, incremental storage under MetaData/InteractionLogs, add MetaData/logging_policy.md. VERSION_BUMP: 0.1.1
response_text: Activated mandatory logging policy by adding MetaData/logging_policy.md, bumping workflow version to 0.1.1, extending schema/spec/example for log_index, and persisting this interaction log entry.
notes: Initial mandatory policy enforcement entry with indexed filename format.
